text: Living a healthy life means taking care of your whole self. A balanced diet gives your body the energy it needs, with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains. Regular exercise, even just a daily walk, keeps your heart strong and your mood positive. Sleep is also essential, so aim for seven to nine hours each night to help your body recover. Equally important is your mental health—find time to relax and manage stress. Finally, a good work-life balance helps you avoid burnout, allowing you to focus on both your career and your personal well-being. Small daily habits can make a big difference.
